lights.note: Spider Farmer bar lights + LED strips. Timer-controlled.

nutrients.note: Big Bloom is a micronutrient supplement only — NOT a complete base feed. DWC requires FoxFarm Grow Big Hydro (veg) + Tiger Bloom (flowering/fruiting) + Big Bloom as the Hydro Trio.

lights: Spider Farmer bar light — middle shelf
Spider Farmer panel — DWC bottom shelf
LED strip bar lights — top shelf
equipment.dwc: Two DWC buckets with hydroton clay pebbles and air stones

notes.indoor_permanent: DWC peppers and herbs stay indoors permanently. Hardening does not apply.
notes.outdoor_container: Lettuce, tomatoes, soil peppers, and bonsai starts are tracked for outdoor hardening.
notes.bonsai: First bonsai season. All three sown Feb 16–20, 2026. Long-term training projects.
